meta.description: Professional advisory services for academic projects.
meta.title: Academic Project Advisory Services

header.title: Academic Project Advisory
header.subtitle: I help you take your academic projects to the next level

home.title: Project Advisory Service
home.subtitle: Professional solutions to guide you in the successful development of your academic project.
home.card1Desc: Specialized guidance for degree projects at school, undergraduate, and graduate levels.
home.card2Desc: Location of relevant academic sources for your theoretical framework and state of the art.
home.card3Desc: Professional creation of visual elements to present your data effectively.
home.ctaDesc: Contact me today to discuss your project and how I can help you.

services.title: Services
services.service1Desc: Specialized guidance for high school students in developing their final projects, with a methodological approach adapted to their academic level.
services.service2Desc: Comprehensive support for university students' degree projects, including problem statement, theoretical framework, and methodological development.
services.service3Desc: Advanced guidance for master's and doctoral theses, especially in health sciences, social sciences, and software or systems engineering.
services.service4Desc: Specialized bibliographic research to strengthen your theoretical framework or state of the art with updated and relevant academic sources.
services.service5Desc: Professional creation of visual elements to present data clearly and attractively, improving the understanding of your research.
services.service6Desc: Impeccable formatting of your document according to updated APA standards, including citations, references, margins, and general structure.
services.service7Desc: Optimization of the linguistic quality of your work, correcting grammatical errors and improving the clarity and coherence of the text.

about.title: About Me
about.para1: Psychologist and backend programmer with solid experience in guiding research projects at all educational levels. My academic training and professional trajectory have allowed me to develop specialized skills in research methodology and academic writing.
about.para2: I specialize in advising projects in the areas of health sciences, social sciences, and software/systems engineering, adapting my approach to the specific needs of each student and project. Throughout my career, I have worked for several years as a volunteer researcher in the university setting, which has given me a deep and comprehensive perspective of the academic and scientific process.
about.feature1: Personalized methodology for each project and academic level.
about.feature2: Experience in various areas of knowledge.
about.feature3: Focus on academic quality and methodological rigor.
about.feature5: Continuous support throughout the entire process.
about.para3: My goal is not only to help successfully complete academic projects, but also to strengthen students' research and writing skills for their future professional development.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: Learn about the experience of other students who have trusted my advisory services.
testimonials.testimonial1: "Samuel was an exceptional advisor who provided me with valuable support and guidance during the development of my thesis. I appreciate his contribution to my academic growth."
testimonials.testimonial2: "I was stuck with the theoretical framework of my thesis until I received this advisory. The reference search service and guidance for applying APA standards were exceptional."
testimonials.testimonial3: "The work done on the project plan report exceeded my expectations. I was impressed by the speed and high quality of the service. The clarity and organization of the report significantly improved the presentation of my planning and facilitated the understanding of my work."
testimonials.testimonial4: "The design of tables and figures for my doctoral thesis exceeded my expectations. The visual presentation of my results significantly improved the understanding of my research."
testimonials.testimonial5: "I really liked your advisory and the development of the final project. The work was very detailed, organized, truly impeccable. I liked it."
testimonials.testimonial5Program: MSc. in Clinical and Health Psychology

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: I'm here to help you with your academic project. Contact me today!

footer.aboutDesc: Academic advisory specialist with experience helping students achieve excellent results in their university theses.

mailto.bodyIntro: Hello! My name is {name} and I am interested in your services. I would like to share the details of a {projectType} project I am working on, and I believe you could help me carry it out in the best way possible. Below, I leave you the relevant information so we can get started.
mailto.bodyClosing: I look forward to your response. Thank you!

success.message: Message sent successfully! I will contact you as soon as possible.
